v0.1: Individuals or workforce roles responsible for coordinating, navigating, facilitating, managing, monitoring, or supporting access to healthcare, behavioral health, social care, community resources, and referral services, and who work with care plans or equivalent plans to promote continuity of care, reduce barriers, and hep individuals archive health and wellbeing goals across care settings and organizations.
Care Coordinator, Care Navigator, Case Manager, Case Worker, Patient Navigator, Community Resource Navigator, Community Outreach Worker, Community Health Worker, etc.
Tools, services, diagnosis, direct clinical treatment authority
Canonical umbrella actor category for RFCC
